entity.label: Adamah
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Red earth, a fortified city of Naphtali, probably the modern Damieh, on the west side of the sea of Tiberias (Josh. 19:33, 36).

nodes.label: Adamah
nodes.description: Red earth, a fortified city of Naphtali, probably the modern Damieh, on the west side of the sea of Tiberias (Josh. 19:33, 36).

verses.text: And Adamah, and Ramah, and Hazor,
